ops.title: cc-notes unification Phase 1: shared anchoring storage core
ops.description: Runbooks gain full anchor support via DRY'd shared anchoring across model/fold/store/notes. Plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/there-are-lots-of-steady-frost.md (Phase 1). Key hazard: Runbook.Anchors/Deleted/Criterion.Note must be omitempty with nil-when-empty folds (Attachments precedent, internal/fold/engine.go:170-186); never edit existing golden vectors; never touch Note/Doc/Log's non-omitempty anchors JSON.

ops.text: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./... green
Golden tests prove pre-anchor create_runbook wire bytes decode + fold DeepEqual to the pre-change snapshot, and anchor-less runbook checkpoint bytes stay byte-identical
notes client covers CreateRunbook with anchors, EditRunbook add/remove anchors, RemoveRunbook, SearchRunbooks, and Relevant surfacing runbooks, all with tests
upgradeHint extended to fold.ErrKindMismatch with test
